<div align="center">

<img src="https://thirteenag.github.io/screens/nfsuc/attract.jpg" width="760" alt="Need for Speed: Undercover - Fusion Fix">

**Need for Speed: Undercover Fusion Fix** adds proper widescreen support, corrects HUD and FOV, and includes a range of visual and quality-of-life improvements.

[Website](https://thirteenag.github.io/wfp#nfsuc) · [Source Code](https://github.com/ThirteenAG/WidescreenFixesPack/blob/master/source/NFSUndercover.FusionFix/dllmain.cpp) · [Default INI](https://github.com/ThirteenAG/WidescreenFixesPack/blob/master/data/NFSUndercover.FusionFix/scripts/NFSUndercover.FusionFix.ini)

</div>

---

## Fixes

<img src="https://thirteenag.github.io/screens/nfsuc/race1.jpg" width="460" align="right" style="margin: 0 0 16px 24px;" alt="Widescreen menu">

- **Resolution** - adds all resolutions in video options menu
- **HUD** - repositioned and scaled to match the active aspect ratio
<br clear="both">

---

## New Options

<img src="https://thirteenag.github.io/screens/nfsuc/race2.jpg" width="360" align="left" style="margin: 0 24px 0px 0;" alt="Gameplay">

- **Skip Intro** - bypass startup FMVs
- **Windowed Mode** - borderless, bordered, resizable, or borderless fullscreen
- **FPS / Sim Rate** - configurable simulation refresh rate; sync to monitor refresh rate or double it
- **Gamepad Support** - Xbox, PlayStation, or no-icon text labels, with fixed front-end bindings
<br clear="both">

<img src="https://thirteenag.github.io/screens/nfsuc/race3.jpg" width="360" align="right" style="margin: 0 0 0 24px;" alt="Shadows">

- **Analog Deadzones** - configurable left and right stick deadzones
- **Custom Save Directory** - redirect user files to any subfolder in the game directory
- **Registry-Free Settings** - optionally saves all game settings to `settings.ini` instead of the registry
<br clear="both">

<img src="https://thirteenag.github.io/screens/nfsuc/race4.jpg" width="360" align="left" style="margin: 0 24px 0px 0;" alt="Gameplay">

- **Shadow Resolution** - configurable dynamic shadow resolution (up to 16384; default 8192)
- **CSM Scale** - configurable cascade shadow map scale and per-cascade draw distances (near / mid / far)
- **Bloom Intensity** - adjustable bloom effect intensity
- **Motion Blur Toggle** - disable motion blur without affecting the World FX setting
<br clear="both">

<img src="https://thirteenag.github.io/screens/nfsuc/race5.jpg" width="360" align="right" style="margin: 0 0 0 24px;" alt="Shadows">

- **Improve Scenery LOD** - increases visible scenery in the closest map section
- **Disable Preculler** - disables precalculated culling
- **Bruteforce Culling** - forces bruteforced culling type to reduce culled scenery
- **Console Gamma** - a custom gamma curve that creates a more contrasted image with deeper colors, similar to how some games looked on the Xbox 360
<br clear="both">

---

## Camera

<img src="https://thirteenag.github.io/screens/nfsuc/camera.gif" width="400" align="right" style="margin: 0 0 16px 24px;" alt="Mouse look in-game">

- **Mouse/Stick Look** - fully functional free-look with adjustable sensitivity for both mouse and right stick. Experience *Need for Speed: Undercover* like never before with new camera angles. Reset timeout, return speed, and vertical axis inversion are all configurable in the `.ini` file.
<br clear="both">

---

## Installation

1. Download the `.zip` from this release.
2. Extract the contents directly into the game folder - the same folder as `nfs.exe`.
3. Optionally edit `NFSUndercover.FusionFix.ini` to configure the available options.
4. Launch the game.
